# awscc_bedrockagentcore_o_auth_2_credential_provider (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::BedrockAgentCore::OAuth2CredentialProvider



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `callback_url` (String) The callback URL for the OAuth2 authorization flow
- `client_secret_arn` (Attributes) The ARN of the client secret in AWS Secrets Manager (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--client_secret_arn))
- `created_time` (String) The timestamp when the credential provider was created
- `credential_provider_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the OAuth2 credential provider
- `credential_provider_vendor` (String) The vendor of the OAuth2 credential provider
- `last_updated_time` (String) The timestamp when the credential provider was last updated
- `name` (String) The name of the OAuth2 credential provider
- `oauth_2_provider_config_input` (Attributes) The configuration settings for the OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input))
- `oauth_2_provider_config_output` (Attributes) The output configuration for the OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_output))
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags to assign to the OAuth2 credential provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--client_secret_arn"></a>
### Nested Schema for `client_secret_arn`

Read-Only:

- `secret_arn` (String) The ARN of the secret in AWS Secrets Manager


<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input`

Read-Only:

- `atlassian_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for an Atlassian OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--atlassian_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `custom_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a custom OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--custom_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `github_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a GitHub OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--github_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `google_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a Google OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--google_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `included_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a supported non-custom OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--included_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `linkedin_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a LinkedIn OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--linkedin_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `microsoft_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a Microsoft OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--microsoft_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `salesforce_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a Salesforce OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--salesforce_oauth_2_provider_config))
- `slack_oauth_2_provider_config` (Attributes) Input configuration for a Slack OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--slack_oauth_2_provider_config))

<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--atlassian_oauth_2_provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input.atlassian_oauth_2_provider_config`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String)
- `client_secret` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--custom_oauth_2_provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input.custom_oauth_2_provider_config`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String) The client ID for the custom OAuth2 provider
- `client_secret` (String) The client secret for the custom OAuth2 provider
- `oauth_discovery` (Attributes) Discovery information for an OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--custom_oauth_2_provider_config--oauth_discovery))

<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--custom_oauth_2_provider_config--oauth_discovery"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input.custom_oauth_2_provider_config.oauth_discovery`

Read-Only:

- `authorization_server_metadata` (Attributes) Authorization server metadata for the OAuth2 provider (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--custom_oauth_2_provider_config--oauth_discovery--authorization_server_metadata))
- `discovery_url` (String) The discovery URL for the OAuth2 provider

<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--custom_oauth_2_provider_config--oauth_discovery--authorization_server_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input.custom_oauth_2_provider_config.oauth_discovery.authorization_server_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `authorization_endpoint` (String) The authorization endpoint URL
- `issuer` (String) The issuer URL for the OAuth2 authorization server
- `response_types` (List of String) The supported response types
- `token_endpoint` (String) The token endpoint URL




<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--github_oauth_2_provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input.github_oauth_2_provider_config`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String)
- `client_secret` (String)

Read-Only:

- `client_secret` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--oauth_2_provider_config_input--included_oauth_2_provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oauth_2_provider_config_input.included_oauth_2_provider_config`

Read-Only:

- `authorization_endpoint` (String) OAuth2 authorization endpoint for your isolated OAuth2 application tenant
- `client_id` (String)
- `client_secret` (String)
- `issuer` (String) Token issuer of your isolated OAuth2 application tenant
- `token_endpoint` (String) OAuth2 token endpoint for your isolated OAuth2 application tenant

- `client_secret` (String)
- `tenant_id` (String) The Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID
